# HPD.ML.Abstractions

Generated from published HPD ML `0.5.0` packages.

## HPD-ML-Abstractions

- [`BackendSpec`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-backendspec.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ConflictPolicy`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-conflictpolicy.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`DevicePreference`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-devicepreference.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`IAnnotationSet`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-iannotationset.md) - Named, typed annotations on a column. Roles (Label, Feature, Weight) use the "role:" prefix. External metadata uses "onnx:", "tf:", etc.
- [`IColumn`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-icolumn.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`IDataHandle`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-idatahandle.md) - A format-agnostic, lazy reference to schema-bearing data. Consumers choose their materialization strategy.
- [`IExecutionEnvironment`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-iexecutionenvironment.md) - Logging, RNG, cancellation, scheduling, device preferences. Immutable after construction. Optional dependency.
- [`IFieldType`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-ifieldtype.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`IGeneratorTransform<TState>`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-igeneratortransform-tstate.md) - Stateful transform: seed input produces variable-length output stream. Each output feeds back as input to the next step. Used for autoregressive generation, Monte Carlo simulation, recursive expansion.
- [`ILearnedParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-ilearnedparameters.md) - Opaque marker for learned parameters. Serializable via ISerializer.
- [`ILearner`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-ilearner.md) - A function (DataHandle, Model?) -&gt; Model that learns parameters from data.
- [`IModel`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-imodel.md) - Immutable bundle of a scoring transform and learned parameters.
- [`IRow`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-irow.md) - A single row with typed column access.
- [`IRowCursor`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-irowcursor.md) - Forward-only cursor over selected columns.
- [`IScanTransform<TState>`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-iscantransform-tstate.md) - Stateful transform: ordered input, state carried across rows, one output per input. Used for time series, sliding windows, running aggregations.
- [`ISchema`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-ischema.md) - Immutable description of named, typed, annotated columns with explicit composition semantics and refinement levels.
- [`ISerializationFormat`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-iserializationformat.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ISerializer`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-iserializer.md) - Save and load models. Native AOT compatible — no reflection.
- [`IStateSerializer<TState>`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-istateserializer-tstate.md) - Zero-copy state serialization for checkpointing.
- [`ITransform`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-itransform.md) - A pure function DataHandle -&gt; DataHandle with a schema signature.
- [`LearnerInput`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-learnerinput.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`LoadRequest`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-loadrequest.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`MaterializationCapabilities`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-materializationcapabilities.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`OrderingPolicy`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-orderingpolicy.md) - Ordering guarantee on a DataHandle.
- [`ProgressEvent`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-progressevent.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`RefinementLevel`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-refinementlevel.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ResourceRequirements`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-resourcerequirements.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`SaveContent`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-savecontent.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`SaveRequest`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-saverequest.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`SerializerExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-serializerextensions.md) - Convenience overloads for Stream-based callers.
- [`TransformComposer`](../types/hpd-ml-abstractions-transformcomposer.md) - Compose transforms left-to-right.
